title: ALH477/Oligarchy
summary: Oligarchy NixOS is a custom NixOS distribution with CachyOS' BORE or Zen kernel. This distribution is made for power users who need peak performance. This distribution is my daily driver which allows me to seamlessly switch from hosting servers like inferences (Ollama) to gaming (Minecraft), music production, and CAD alongside simulation software.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research

title: dovvnloading/Graphlink
